subcodes.first_line: The springtime has come and God's beauteous new rose has bloomed; the nightingale of divine truth begins its soul-stirring song [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نوبهار اولدی آچلدی نوگل رعنای حق نغمه جانسوزه باشلر بلبل گویای حق
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @music and singing, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @symbolism, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Holy Spirit
